import numpy as np

def get_top_scores(scores: np.ndarray, n: int) -> np.ndarray:
    sorted_indices = np.argsort(scores)[::-1]
    return scores[sorted_indices[:n]]

def filter_valid(data: np.ndarray, mask: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
    return data[mask]

def compute_stats(values: np.ndarray) -> dict:
    return {
        "mean": np.mean(values),
        "std": np.std(values),
        "min": np.min(values),
        "max": np.max(values),
        "median": np.median(values),
    }

def find_peaks(signal: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
    diff = np.diff(signal)
    return np.where(diff > 0)[0]
